visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark, wavy hair and fair skin stands in a brightly lit warehouse aisle, wearing a black long-sleeved top with a decorative neckline. She is holding a red and white product box featuring three plush dog toys: a bright yellow chicken, a white cow with black spots, and a vibrant green alligator. The background is filled with tall industrial shelving units stacked with various products, notably blue boxes of bottled water. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the plush toys. First, a bright yellow plush chicken with a red comb and large, shiny black eyes is shown. Next, a white plush cow with black patches and a smiling face is presented. Finally, a green textured alligator plush with a yellow underbelly and small black eyes is highlighted. The lighting remains bright and consistent, reflecting off the plush material's soft texture. (3) The scene shifts to a price tag on a shelf, showing "579" in large black numbers. The woman's hands are seen pointing at the tag and then touching the toys to demonstrate their softness and size relative to her palm. The editing includes fast cuts between the price tag and the woman's face, which shows expressions of excitement and approval as she speaks. (4) The woman holds the box closer to the camera, showcasing the brand name "KONG" on the packaging. She points to the back of the box, which has illustrations and information about the "squeaker" feature. The video ends with her holding all three plush toys together, smiling directly at the viewer in a medium shot, with the warehouse setting providing a deep background perspective.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你那什麼臉. (2) [Subtitle]: 為什麼 為什麼這個臉. (3) [Subtitle]: 又不讓人家買. (4) [Subtitle]: 你又要拿起來看. (5) [Subtitle]: 要看一下 因為他長得那麼可愛. (6) [Subtitle]: 有小黃雞 小白牛 小鱷魚. (7) [Subtitle]: 我跟你們說 長得可愛沒有用. (8) [Subtitle]: 這個小氣的 是不會帶你們回家. (9) [Subtitle]: 誒 我跟你們說 超便宜的. (10) [Subtitle]: 因為他只要579. [Variety]: 有三隻娃娃. (11) [Subtitle]: 他一個不用200塊誒. (12) [Subtitle]: 小隻的鱷魚給阿沐. (13) [Subtitle]: 他的size是兩個手掌. (14) [Subtitle]: 頭超可愛而且都會啾啾對不對. (15) [Subtitle]: 這個鱷魚在前面. (16) [Subtitle]: 這個牛在腦門上. (17) [Subtitle]: 啊 他這個很適合大狗. (18) [Subtitle]: 因為他的啾啾球 是這種球狀. (19) [Subtitle]: 所以大顆的 你們家狗狗如果嘴巴夠大. (20) [Subtitle]: 就會一直含著 這就很好玩. (21) [Subtitle]: 他就會變 [Variety]: 落水雞. (22) [Subtitle]: 真的很可愛. (23) [Subtitle]: 而且是KUNG的 很不錯哦. (24) [Variety]: 專做寵物有保障. (25) [Subtitle]: 推薦 可愛值得買一個 不用199. (26) [Subtitle]: 小雞 小牛 小鱷魚 等你哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 pair of hands belonging to another person appearing briefly to interact with the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark wavy hair, wearing a black long-sleeved shirt with a lace-up detail at the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse-style store with high industrial metal shelves. In the background, there are large quantities of blue packaged water bottles (Kirkland Signature) and other bulk items stacked on pallets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, percussive electronic track featuring a strong rhythmic bassline and syncopated beats. A female voice enters immediately with an enthusiastic and bright tone, speaking at a fast pace. A sharp "ding" sound effect coincides with the appearance of the first text overlay, adding a sense of urgency and excitement. (2) As the narrator describes the individual toys, a distinct "squeak" sound effect is layered over the music, mimicking the sound of the toys themselves. The music remains at a constant, high-energy volume level, while the narrator's pitch stays high and animated. Small digital "pop" SFX are heard during scene transitions, maintaining a fast-paced production feel. (3) When the price is mentioned, a bell-like chime rings out, highlighting the numerical value. The narrator's speech density remains high, with very few pauses. The music's beat becomes more pronounced, driving the promotional energy. Background warehouse noise is extremely muffled and virtually imperceptible beneath the mastered music and vocal tracks. (4) Towards the conclusion, the narrator's tone becomes more persuasive and inviting. The music continues its looped, high-tempo rhythm without any major shifts in texture. A final "ding" or sparkling sound effect plays as the call to action is delivered, and the audio track ends abruptly on a beat, completing the energetic product showcase.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Product Reveal -> Feature Demonstration -> Pricing -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a fast-paced, high-energy product showcase aimed at promoting a set of KONG brand plush dog toys available at Costco. It uses enthusiastic narration, upbeat music, and rapid editing to highlight the cuteness, durability, and affordability of the items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product presentation, price highlighting, and positive personal recommendation from the creator.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social-media native editing style with heavy use of Traditional Chinese text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
